title: general question about skopeo copy
body:
I have service doing skopeo copy
I have general question
does skopeo using memeory or disk space while copying image? I am asking whether skopeo using disk/memory space as temp storage while copying?

scenraio is that copy 10GB docker image from one bucket to other 10 different bucket (regions)

comments.body:
That really doesn’t have _general_ answer.

Copies from `docker://` do `docker://` are streaming with negligible local storage or RAM requirements; many other copies (notably anything involving `docker-archive:` might use on-disk storage.
Got it, Thank you so much!
